---
title: "Research Data Management"
format:
  html:
    theme: 
        - default
        - ../../../uon.scss   
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
    page-layout: article
    output-file: 02-research_data_managment.html
  revealjs:
    output-file: 02-research_data_managment.revealjs.html
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    preview-links: auto
editor: visual
---

# stuff {background="#43464B"}

stuff about stuff
